  "executive_summary": "A lean ML serving architecture for real-time delivery time prediction, designed for a 4-person team. The system separates the hot path (feature assembly → model inference → response) from the cold path (data collection → training → evaluation → promotion). A pre-computed feature store eliminates expensive joins at inference time, keeping P99 under 100ms. Model versioning with blue-green deployment enables safe weekly retraining with instant rollback.
